extractingEspresso_1_content:
Place an empty portafilter on the grinder deposit and press the button.
The machine will grind the beans and fill the portafilter with ground beans.
extractingEspresso_2_content: Before placing the portafilter on the espresso machine, tamp filter beans with a tamper.
extractingEspresso_3_content:
Adjust spout of the portafilter by clicking.
Place a tamped portafilter on the espresso machine.
Place espresso cups under the portafiler as many spout count.
You can see shadows under the portafilter.
To extract cups of espresso, press the third button.
extractingEspresso_4_content: After extracting cups of espresso, empty portafilter through hit the knock box.
frothingMilk_1_content:
Open the cap of the milk pack through clicking whild holding.
Pour milk in an empty pitcher through tilting the milk pack.
frothingMilk_2_content:
Place the milk-filled pitcher on the frothing nozzle of espresso machine.
To change the frothing mode, press the fourth button.
To begin frothing, press the button on the machine's side.
frothingMilk_3_content:
You can pour milk in a pitcher by tilting and clicking it.
Be careful if pouring out milk on the floor by accident.
whippedCream_1_content: Using the cream dispenser, you can add wipped cream to any type of beverage.
whippedCream_2_content: When there is no powder or syrup on the beverage, you can add whipped cream.
whippedCream_3_content: Optionally, powder or syrup can be sprinkled on whipped cream.
dishesAndIce_1_content: Espresso cups and Coffee cups can be placed on their respective plates.
dishesAndIce_2_content: Straws can be placed on glass cups.
dishesAndIce_3_content: If dished are dirty or have leftovers, you can soak them in the sink and wash them off.
dishesAndIce_4_content: You can get ice through touching the button on the ice dispenser with glass cup.
info_contact_content:
If you find a bug or have any questions about the coffee set, please contact me via Discord.
Please use English or Korean.
